import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        if in_num
          result = list.push(result, current * sign)
          current = 0
          sign = 1
          in_num = false
        end
      else if b == 45
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, current * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn process(_ l1: String, _ l2: String) -> Unit
  let a = parse_ints(l1)
  let b = parse_ints(l2)
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      match b.get(i)
      when Some(y)
        let s = x + y
        println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(l1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(l2)
    process(l1, l2)
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
